games.title: SCRAP CIRCUIT: BOSS RUN
games.attractText:
BUTTON 1: START / PLACE BAIT NODE  •  STICK: MOVE  •  BUTTON 2: PULSE DASH
Lure scrap beasts through your gadgets, overload cores, survive 3 boss hunts.

games.title: Patch Drift: Boss Garage
games.attractText: PATCH DRIFT: BOSS GARAGE — Glide your grease mechanic around the ring, grab flying scrap, and stack matching parts into repair towers before each rogue machine crushes the shop. Stick to drift. BUTTON 1: start / wrench toss / confirm. BUTTON 2: magnetic dodge. Build all 3 towers to win the duel.

games.title: Gridline Getaway
games.attractText:
GRIDLINE GETAWAY
Button 1: START / PHASE DASH
Button 2: BRAKE SHIELD
Stick: switch lanes one step per press

Outrun the tiny swarm through shifting lane traps.
Reach the exit gate before panic hits 100.

games.title: NEON BONE RUSH
games.attractText:
NEON BONE RUSH
Button 1: START / JUMP
Button 2: DASH
Hold stick to lean in air
Chain near-misses and pickups to build FEVER

games.title: DRIFTHOOK CHAMBERS
games.attractText:
DRIFTHOOK CHAMBERS

Clear every room.
Wild momentum, heavy bruisers.

STICK  Move / drift
BUTTON 1  Launch hook / start
BUTTON 2  Brake burst

Hit all anchors in a room to purge it.
Bruisers wake and slam when you get close.
Clear the connected chambers.

PRESS BUTTON 1

games.title: Moonstep Relic
games.attractText: MOONSTEP RELIC — Hop, dodge, endure the moon ruins, then break the guardian boss. Button 1: start/jump/strike. Button 2: phase dodge.

games.title: Trash Dog: Bin Shift
games.attractText:
TRASH DOG: BIN SHIFT
Button 1: start / bite-push bins
Button 2: bark pulse
Stick: move one tile at a time

Solve each junkyard maze by shoving bins onto glowing pads while dodging swarms of rats.

games.title: Rocket Cat: Grid Burn
games.attractText:
ROCKET CAT: GRID BURN

Button 1: start / place spark
Button 2: dash
Stick: move one tile at a time

Light every safe tile before the ember swarm traps you.

games.title: ROAD DOG: BARK RUSH
games.attractText: ROAD DOG: BARK RUSH — Button 1 to start. Stick to move. Button 1: bark burst. Button 2: dash. Survive the swarm, chain close calls, grab bones.

games.title: Rocket Cat: Prism Pounce
games.attractText: ROCKET CAT: PRISM POUNCE — Aim with the stick, fire with Button 1, dash with Button 2. Match prism cores by color, clear waves, survive the scramble.

games.title: Whisker Wards
games.attractText: WHISKER WARDS — A scrappy cat defends a shrinking puzzle board. Aim with the stick, fire with Button 1, dodge with Button 2. Match rune colors by shooting the right targets before the traps seal in. Button 1 to start.

games.title: Neon Pounce EX
games.attractText: NEON POUNCE EX — Robo-cat arena shooter. Move with stick, auto-aim with your movement, Button 1 to fire/start, Button 2 to dash. Chain hits to boost score. Survive the neon swarm.
